introSection: Rudy's Rapid Transit was a steel roller coaster previously located at Santa's Village in Jefferson, New Hampshire, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Firefly Roller Coaster opened at Benson's Animal Park in Hudson, New Hampshire, USA in 1981. The ride closed in 1987.

The coaster was relocated to Santa's Village, where it was renamed Rudy's Rapid Transit and reopened in 1988.

In May 2023, the park announced that the coaster would close later in the year.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Rudy's Rapid Transit was a Zierer Tivoli Large model. This model has a double figure eight layout, which is two figure eights with a circle around them.

fullText:
Rudy's Rapid Transit was a steel roller coaster previously located at Santa's Village in Jefferson, New Hampshire, USA.

Firefly Roller Coaster opened at Benson's Animal Park in Hudson, New Hampshire, USA in 1981. The ride closed in 1987.

The coaster was relocated to Santa's Village, where it was renamed Rudy's Rapid Transit and reopened in 1988.

In May 2023, the park announced that the coaster would close later in the year.

Rudy's Rapid Transit was a Zierer Tivoli Large model. This model has a double figure eight layout, which is two figure eights with a circle around them.
